CREATE TABLE Categories (CategoryID INT, CategoryName VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE Products (ProductID INT, ProductName VARCHAR(255), CategoryID INT);
INSERT INTO Products (ProductID, ProductName, CategoryID) VALUES (1, 'Tea', 1), (2, 'Coffee', 1);

SELECT xml_auto_dtd('SELECT category.CategoryID, category.CategoryName, product.ProductName, product.ProductID FROM Demo..Categories AS category JOIN Demo..Products AS product ON product.CategoryID = category.CategoryID FOR XML AUTO, ELEMENTS', 'root');

SELECT xml_auto_dtd('SELECT category.CategoryID, category.CategoryName, (SELECT product.ProductName FROM Demo..Products AS product WHERE product.CategoryID = category.CategoryID FOR XML AUTO, ELEMENTS) AS Products FROM Demo..Categories AS category FOR XML AUTO, ELEMENTS', 'root');

SELECT xml_auto_dtd('SELECT category.CategoryID, (SELECT COUNT(product.ProductID) FROM Demo..Products AS product WHERE product.CategoryID = category.CategoryID) AS ProductCount FROM Demo..Categories AS category FOR XML AUTO, ELEMENTS', 'root');

SELECT xml_auto_dtd('SELECT category.CategoryID, (SELECT product.ProductID, product.ProductName FROM Demo..Products AS product WHERE product.CategoryID = category.CategoryID FOR XML AUTO, ELEMENTS) AS Products FROM Demo..Categories AS category WHERE category.CategoryID = 1 FOR XML AUTO, ELEMENTS', 'root');

SELECT xml_auto_dtd('SELECT category.CategoryID, category.CategoryName FROM Demo..Categories AS category WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Demo..Products AS product WHERE product.CategoryID = category.CategoryID) FOR XML AUTO, ELEMENTS', 'root');

SELECT xml_auto_dtd('SELECT category.CategoryID, category.CategoryName, (SELECT product.ProductName FROM Demo..Products AS product WHERE product.CategoryID = category.CategoryID FOR XML AUTO, ELEMENTS) AS ProductNames FROM Demo..Categories AS category WHERE category.CategoryName LIKE ''%Drink%'' FOR XML AUTO, ELEMENTS', 'root');
